name: Tennocon 2026 Glyph
description: A glyph created to celebrate eleven years of TennoCon.

languages.description: Eine Glyphe, kreiert, um das elfjährige Jubiläum der TennoCon in zu feiern.
languages.name: Glyphe: TennoCon 2026

languages.description: Un Glyphe créé pour célébrer les onze ans de la TennoCon.
languages.name: Glyphe TennoCon 2026

languages.description: Un glifo creato per celebrare gli undici anni del TennoCon.
languages.name: Glifo TennoCon 2026

languages.description: Un glifo creado para celebrar los once años de la TennoCon.
languages.name: Glifo de TennoCon 2026

languages.description: 为庆祝 TennoCon 十一周年而创作的浮印。
languages.name: TennoCon 2026 浮印

languages.description: Глиф, созданный в честь 11-й годовщины TennoCon.
languages.name: Глиф: TennoCon-2026

languages.description: TennoConの11周年を記念して作られたグリフ。
languages.name: TennoCon 2026 グリフ

languages.description: Glif stworzony, aby uczcić jedenastolecie TennoCon.
languages.name: Glif TennoCon 2026

languages.description: Um glifo criado para celebrar o 11º aniversário da TennoCon.
languages.name: Glifo: TennoCon 2026

languages.description: 為慶祝 TennoCon 十一週年而創作的浮印。
languages.name: TennoCon 2026 浮印

languages.description: ภาพสัญลักษณ์ที่จัดทำขึ้นเพื่อฉลองงาน TennoCon ครบรอบสิบเอ็ดปี
languages.name: ภาพสัญลักษณ์ TennoCon 2026

languages.description: TennoCon'un on birinci yılını kutlamak için oluşturulmuş bir glif.
languages.name: TennoCon 2026 Glifi
